characteristic_scope.cause: G_g(a)_ii = 2 g_i a_i is diagonal-blind in char 2 -- CL-H9
characteristic_scope.char2_faithfulness_resolved: CL-H10: faithful on the corrected 3-dim quotient Sym_3/(Im G_g (+) <g g^T>); the naive 4-dim analog fails by the 1-dim phantom <g g^T>

CL-H10.statement: char-2 faithfulness RESOLVED via the raw chart-level RoleChSpec (channels of the full Hessian, before the gauge-normal substitution). The raw channels are char-2-defined (g-monomial denominators, no 1/(2 g)) and equal the gauge-normal object over char != 2 (CL-H2). In char 2 they are invariant under the diagonal-blind gauge AND under the rank-one PHANTOM direction g g^T (= G_g(g/2) over Q, but outside the collapsed char-2 gauge image). The blind spot is EXACTLY <g g^T> (1-dim): so the naive 4-dim {H11,H22,H33,ell} analog FAILS by one dimension, and RoleChSpec is FAITHFUL on the corrected 3-dim quotient Sym_3 / (Im G_g (+) <g g^T>) -- the same dimension (3) as the char != 2 carrier O.

CL-H3.statement: closed RoleChSpec formulas in (g, O) for all active roles

CL-H4.statement: RoleChSpec equal forces O = O' (linear recovery, rank 3) on the saturated regular locus

CL-H5.statement: every denominator/singularity component typed; none beyond regularity over Q

CL-H6.statement: symbolic machinery retrodicts Campaign G (0/0 counterexamples)

CL-H8.saturation_note: the minor-numerator ideal is already <1> (this constant minor), so the Rabinowitsch saturation <minors, 1 - t g1g2g3> = <1> does no work
CL-H8.statement: char != 2 strengthening: r=1 linear recovery is full rank on the regular locus over any field where 2 is invertible (not only Q)

CL-H9.cause: G_g(a)_ii = 2 g_i a_i is 0 in char 2 (gauge is diagonal-blind)
char2_invariants: ell = g3 O12 + g2 O13 + g1 O23
CL-H9.open_analog: RESOLVED by CL-H10 (was: OPEN, blocked on the raw chart-level RoleChSpec definition). The char-2 faithfulness analog is now answered via the raw channels of the full Hessian -- see CL-H10. The derived-wall facts of CL-H9 (gauge-rank collapse 3 -> 2, quotient k^4) are unchanged.
CL-H9.statement: char != 2 is a DERIVED structural wall: in char 2 the gauge G_g(a)_ii = 2 g_i a_i is diagonal-blind, Im(G_g) drops 3 -> 2, and the quotient is k^4 -- the k^3 carrier O does not exist in char 2

theorem_H.not_claimed: fields where -1 is a square (sums of squares not definite)
theorem_H.scope: regular n=3 active-role locus over Q
theorem_H.statement: For regular g (g1 g2 g3 != 0) and H1, H2 in Sym_3(Q): RoleChSpec_g(H1) = RoleChSpec_g(H2)  iff  O_g(H2 - H1) = 0. Proof: pass to the gauge-normal representative H_perp = H - G_g(a), a_i = H_ii/(2 g_i) (Lemma H1); RoleChSpec depends only on H_perp (Lemma H2); its r=1 channels are linear forms in O whose 6x3 coefficient matrix has rank 3 with a g-only nonzero minor (Lemma H4), so O is recovered linearly -> injective. Over Q the minor numerator 16 g2^4 (g1^2 + g3^2) is nonzero on g1 g2 g3 != 0, so there is no exceptional stratum beyond regularity.
